ccStatusbar.cmd.useClaude: Claude/Codex Statusbar: Use Claude Code provider
ccStatusbar.cfg.provider: Which usage source the status bar should show.
ccStatusbar.cfg.provider.auto: Choose the active provider automatically for this workspace.
ccStatusbar.cfg.codex.commandPath: Optional path to the Codex CLI executable. Leave empty to auto-detect from the OpenAI/ChatGPT VS Code extension, npm global install, or PATH.
ccStatusbar.cfg.language: Language of the status bar and its tooltip.
ccStatusbar.cfg.language.auto: Follow the editor's display language (Russian for ru*, English otherwise)
